name: Willie Weeks
abstract: Willie Weeks (born August 5, 1947) is an American bass guitarist. He has gained fame performing with famous musicians in a wide variety of genres.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Donny Hathaway/ Herbie Mann Quintet and The Family of Mann

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: I said “Well, who’s in it?” She says... I think Willie Weeks was on bass... I was really glad to be a part of that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
